name: claude-code-controller
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for controlling the locally installed Claude Code CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Run the local Claude Code CLI from Codex through a wrapper script.
interface.longDescription: Adds a repo-local skill for checking the local Claude Code install, running one-shot prompts, and resuming Claude sessions on this machine without remembering raw CLI flags.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code to inspect the local installation.
Ask Claude Code a one-shot question about this repo.
Resume a Claude Code session for this workspace.
